---
title: "Zimuzo Obi"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
listing:
  id: writings-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "DD/MM/YYYY"
  max-items: 3
  type: default
  fields: [title, date]
---

:::{.group}
QA Analyst @ Kaplan International Pathways | MSc Data Science (In progress)

I just possess skills that you need so maybe just reach out to me lol.
To get in contact, you can send an [email](mailto:obizimuzo@gmail.com), connect with me on [linkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zimobi/){target="_blank"}, or see my code contributions on [github.](https://github.com/0xzim){target="_blank"}
:::

:::{.group}
##### **Projects:**
Context-Aware AI Alt-Text Generation for Web Accessibility (WIP)
<!-- [Machine Learning Projects](https://github.com/0xzim/ml-challenges){target="_blank"} -->

<!-- [Cyclistic Analysis](https://0xzim.github.io/cyclistic/){target="_blank"}

[Export Performance Analysis](https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiNGFiZWJlODItMWVmMi00YzI1LWFlMzgtMjAwM2JiYzczN2Y1IiwidCI6IjBiOGEyNWY5LTg3ZWItNDAzYi04OWU0LTJhNTZlMjJhZGUzYSJ9){target="_blank"} -->
:::

:::{.group}

##### **Writing:** 

:::{#writings-listing}
:::
[View all writings →](blog.qmd)
:::
